name: task_add_context
description: Add a typed context source to an existing task. Context sources provide the task with relevant external data from integrations like GitHub, Slack, Jira, or custom sources. Each context source has a type and structured data payload. Multiple context sources can be attached to a single task.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to add context to

context_type.description: Type of context source being added

context_data.description: Typed context data specific to the context_type. For 'github': repository, issue_number, pr_number, etc. For 'slack': channel, thread_ts, etc. For 'jira': project_key, issue_key, etc. For 'custom': any structured data.

examples.name: Add GitHub context to a task

context_data.summary: Team discussion about search latency spike with initial triage notes
